examples: Just after vaccinia infects a cell, it expresses two viral proteins on the cell surface, which marks the cell as infected.
Objective To investigate expression of IL 6 in non replicating vaccinia virus and its immune effects on recombinant virus.
Under normal conditions, vaccinia spread across one cell every 1.2 hours, which was slowed to one cell every five to six hours.
In this case, a little genetic engineering convinced vaccinia to produce an important rabies antigen.
The vaccinia infection caused by the vaccine is usually mild and transient.
